text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol. 24 — persistent storage, hono rewrites, and 105 PRs

A heavy shipping week. We merged 105 PRs. Here is the signal in the noise:

→ PERSISTENT MEDIA
We added a Cloudflare R2 upload service (media.pollinations.ai). You can now securely store generated images instead of watching them instantly vanish into the ether.

→ THE CIRCLE OF LIFE
The community built 50+ new apps this week. To prevent the showcase from becoming a graveyard of abandoned weekend projects, we added daily health checks. Stale apps get automatically pruned. We also added a 15-category economics dashboard to track it all.

→ MODEL UPGRADES
Claude 4.6, Gemini 3.1, Grok-imagine, and Seedream 5.0 Lite are live. We migrated Claude to the direct Anthropic API so prompt caching actually works. Text models now report their context window sizes in the API.

→ BACKEND REWRITES
The text service was ported to Hono and TypeScript. Polly's API is now fully OpenAI-compatible. Wan video generation now gracefully falls back to DashScope when rate limits hit.

Docs and endpoints are updated.
github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools #TypeScript
